claim_text: Other Bali's Uluwatu planning label includes anchors in Pecatu and nearby Ungasan; it is not one official compact district.
label: INTERPRETED
allowed_wording: Other Bali uses Uluwatu as a practical planning label that includes verified anchors in Pecatu and nearby Ungasan.
prohibited_wording: Uluwatu is one official district / exact tourist boundaries are fixed.

claim_text: Pura Luhur Uluwatu is associated with Pecatu and sits on a sea cliff above the Indian Ocean.
label: EXTRACTED
allowed_wording: Pura Luhur Uluwatu is a Pecatu cliff-side cultural anchor.
prohibited_wording: Guaranteed sunset / current hours or ticket terms.

claim_text: GWK Cultural Park is in Ungasan while Uluwatu Temple is in Pecatu.
label: EXTRACTED
allowed_wording: GWK is in Ungasan; Uluwatu Temple is in Pecatu.
prohibited_wording: GWK is in Pecatu / fixed travel time between them.

claim_text: Padang Padang and Nyang Nyang are verified Pecatu/Uluwatu-area beach identities.
label: EXTRACTED
allowed_wording: Padang Padang and Nyang Nyang are distinct Pecatu/Uluwatu-area beach anchors.
prohibited_wording: Safe swimming / easy access / family-friendly / exact stairs.
refresh_requirement: Field-check before access or suitability wording

claim_text: The evidence pack does not verify walkability, scooter necessity, fixed journey times, family fit or accessibility.
label: EXTRACTED
allowed_wording: Choose accommodation and transport only after checking the exact route and current access conditions.
prohibited_wording: You need a scooter / easy by taxi / walkable / accessible for everyone.
refresh_requirement: Field and route check required for stronger wording

claim_text: Current hours, tickets, day passes, prices and venue policies are volatile.
label: EXTRACTED
allowed_wording: Check current official terms for the date of your visit.
prohibited_wording: Evergreen hours / guaranteed entry / current price or day pass.
